name: prompt-desk
description: Local web workspace for inspecting, searching, versioning, and safely managing Codex context files.

scripts.dev: npm --workspace @prompt-desk/shared run build && concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @prompt-desk/shared run build && npm --workspace @prompt-desk/server run build && npm --workspace @prompt-desk/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @prompt-desk/shared run build && npm --workspace @prompt-desk/server run typecheck && npm --workspace @prompt-desk/web run typecheck
